title: Registered Nurse
description:
Mass General Brigham is a premier healthcare system advancing medicine through research, innovation, and patient-centered care across New England.

We're seeking a Registered Nurse to join our Healthcare team in San Francisco. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Provide direct patient care and coordinate nursing interventions
Assess patient condition and develop individualized care plans
Administer medications and perform nursing procedures safely
Collaborate with interdisciplinary team to optimize patient outcomes
Educate patients and families on health management
Maintain accurate medical records and ensure HIPAA compliance

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Nursing (BSN preferred, ASN acceptable)
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of nursing experience in acute care or specialized setting
